hypothesis: Geometry and correlated disorder alone produce the broad normalized transition.
parameterFields: Rn, Tc, correlated disorder, Hall-bar geometry
allowedClaim: Tests whether two-dimensional connectivity is necessary before adding extra physics.
notAllowedClaim: Does not infer a microscopic strain tensor or order parameter.

hypothesis: Local superconducting scale follows a bounded lattice-sensitive Tc prior.
parameterFields: Tc baseline, enhanced Tc range, mechanical/Raman proxy
allowedClaim: Tests whether bounded enhanced-Tc heterogeneity improves transport shape.
notAllowedClaim: Does not convert pressure directly to uniaxial strain.

hypothesis: Weak boundaries behave like continuous SNS/constriction-like links with gap-tied Ic.
parameterFields: Delta(Tc), Rn, class factor F_SNS(T/Tc), global transparency
allowedClaim: Tests whether gap-tied weak boundaries explain broad tails and top/bottom differences.
notAllowedClaim: Does not fit a separate Ic(T) law for every link.

hypothesis: Crack/tear or delaminated regions behave as lower-transparency tunnel-like bottlenecks.
parameterFields: Delta(Tc), Rn, AB-like F_tunnel(T/Tc), crack transparency
allowedClaim: Tests whether low-transparency bottlenecks are needed near cracks or discontinuities.
notAllowedClaim: Does not prove an insulating tunnel junction exists.

hypothesis: Metal contacts and crystal-axis anisotropy redistribute the effective mechanical response and weak-link transparency.
parameterFields: contact-relaxation mask, anisotropic W_ij, current-crowding score
allowedClaim: Tests whether contacts and anisotropy must be represented as spatially structured priors.
notAllowedClaim: Does not prove contact strain values without direct strain mapping.

hypothesis: Field oscillations require phase-aware loops/edges and are intentionally not fit by the core scalar network.
parameterFields: not fitted in core model; future Josephson/phase module only
allowedClaim: Defines a limit of the present model, preventing overinterpretation of magnetic oscillations.
notAllowedClaim: Does not claim quantitative vortex/fluxoid-period prediction.
